title: Star Wars Campaign Pack

The '''''Star Wars Campaign Pack''''' is a gamemaster accessory for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The supplement includes adventure scenarios featuring the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|starship]] ''[[Long Shot]]'' and a [[Star Warriors: Starfighter Combat in the Star Wars Universe|''Star Warriors'']] combat scenario, as well as full-color floor plans of the ''Long Shot'' and a Gamemaster Screen. The ''Star Wars Campaign Pack'' was written by [[Paul Murphy]] and published by [[West End Games]] in [[1988]]. Its content was later incorporated into the [[1994]] supplement ''[[Classic Campaigns]]''.

{{Book-stub}}
